arts.ttl: “The man is a genius” – Midfielder praises coach he worked under at Brighton despite players questioning everything
arts.sum: Former Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Jakub Moder has described Roberto de Zerbi as a genius, despite his methods leaving the Seagulls squad scratching their heads. The midfielder has been speaking about his former manager to Voetbal International, insisting the Italian was undoubtedly the best he’s worked under.
